title: The Hockey Captain That Hates Me
genre: Campus Lovers, Love-Hate, Revenge, Hidden Feelings, Competition, Hooking-up
synopsis_or_hook: Plus-size figure skater Skylar Carter hates the arrogant hockey team captain, Mason Reed, with good reason. When Skylar’s prank against the team leaves Mason injured, she’s forced to be his assistant or risk losing her own sports future. Forced together, their rivalry turns into undeniable chemistry. But after the school announces only one program will survive to next season, Skylar and Mason may be falling for the one person whose victory could destroy their dreams.

title: Breaking My Bodyguard
genre: Royalty/Nobility, Campus Lovers, Hidden Feelings, First Love, Friendship, Adventure
synopsis_or_hook: Vera Marchesa just wants one thing: freedom from the dangerous mafia world she grew up in, and her overprotective bodyguard Dante, who refuses to love her. Determined to prove she's not a helpless princess, Vera pushes the one line Dante swore never to cross… even if that means they will crash and burn together.

title: My Alpha Boss Gave Me Triplets
genre: Modern, Workplace, Romantic, Forbidden Love, Emotional, Possessive
synopsis_or_hook: Evie, a talented but vulnerable human designer, becomes bound to Leopold, the ruthless Alpha of the Stonehearth Pack, leaving her pregnant with his rare triplets. To protect her, Leopold forces her to move in with him, presenting their relationship as purely transactional while privately struggling with uncontrollable mate-bond instincts that cause him to share Evie's pain and emotions. As Evie is drawn into Leopold’s corporate and pack world, Darleen, a powerful she-wolf from another pack determined to claim Leopold, escalates from professional threats to phsyical ones. Evie's estranged family piles on by attempting to kidnap her. Will Leopold be able to prioritize his mate over everything, and save her from the whirlwind he brought her into?

title: I Accidentally Sexted My Enemy
genre: Playboy, Possessive, Wallflower, Athlete, Contract Lovers, Neighbors
synopsis_or_hook: In I Accidentally Sexted My Enemy Episode 1, Evelyn is about to confess her feelings through writing a love letter to Vincent. Yet, her actual crush, Vincent, only appears after her arch-nemesis, Colton, and some other bullies haze and expose her. Once she wears her suggestive-looking underwear, will it be Vincent or Colton noticing her?

title: Double Life of a Cell Block King
genre: Independent Woman, Job Seeker, Strong-Willed, Hidden Identity, Love After Marriage, Business
synopsis_or_hook: Harrison had deliberately gone to prison to gather the evidence he needed to take back everything that's owed to him. In Double Life of a Cell Block King Episode 1, 117 days into prison, he finally met his fiancée Bianca, who dumped him for Xavier, his half-brother. Betrayed, Harrison got out of prison, vowing to make them pay. What happens next?

title: Alpha Daddy Make Me Yours
genre: Billionaire, Hot Daddy/DILF, Werewolf, Single Dad, Age Gap, Taboo
synopsis_or_hook: Lyra was spending the summer with her best friend Tasha in Alpha Daddy Make Me Yours Episode 1. She shared all her dirty secrets and dreams with Tasha except for her secret crush on Tasha's dad, Alpha Damon. But Arya's secret comes close to being exposed when Tasha discovers a picture of the three with a heart drawn on Damon's face. What happens next?

title: Taming My Bullies 3
genre: Strong-Willed, Jock, Love Triangle, Enemies to Lovers, Amnesia, Breakup
synopsis_or_hook: The doctor team's statement about Rowan's head trauma in the Taming My Bullies 3 Episode 1 saddens not only Emma, but also Victoria. Not only does Victoria ask her assistants to get the best neurologist, but she also prevents Emma, Karl, and Liam from seeing Rowan. Is it what Victoria wants when Rowan wakes up, forgetting Emma?

title: Dark Notes
genre: Teacher, Taboo, Age Gap, Hidden Feelings, Secret, Love at First Sight
synopsis_or_hook: Ivory was abused by her brother Shane in Dark Notes Episode 1. Luckily she was saved by a handsome yet kind stranger. She was drawn to the man, unaware he was her new professor. What happens next? Check out the latest episodes now!

title: The Imperfect Marriage
genre: CEO, Love Triangle, Flash Marriage, Age Gap, Caught Cheating, Getting Back at Ex
synopsis_or_hook: Based on the novel by L. Steele. After her fiancé cheats on her, Vivian flash marries a hot silver fox… only to realize he’s her ex’s dad. The deal is simple: two weeks of marriage, a CEO title for Quentin and enough money for Vivian to save her sick dad. But as her ex keeps humiliating her and his dad keeps saving her, Vivian's fake marriages starts to cross very real lines.

title: Campus Saga: Superpower Teen
genre: Heiress/Socialite, Jock, Super Power, Campus Lovers, Revenge, Hooking-up
synopsis_or_hook: Brian struggles with his nervousness to ask Mia out in the Campus Saga Superpower Teen Episode 1's stories. Yet, he no longer hesitates once Mia signals him to go inside the school for a supposedly ONS session. So, is it the trap Mia sets up against him when everybody else suddenly shoots his naked photo?

title: CEO's Twins Want Mommy Back
genre: Workplace, USA, Apartment, Mall, Hospital, Office
synopsis_or_hook: Cassandra Mortensen gave birth to a boy and a girl in CEO's Twins Want Mommy Back Episode 1. She had previously been disowned by her father, who wanted Cassandra to lose the kids. However, Cassandra called her father out for his affair behind her mother's back, leading up to her getting disowned. Who was the father to Cassandra's twins?

synopsis_or_hook: At her parents' anniversary party, a successful CEO is dismissed as a low-class nobody, her diamond gift is called fake, and she's even banned from the table!

title: The Dominant Heir's Triumphant Return
synopsis_or_hook: Sean York is born into a respected family. For the past three years, he has been in a relationship with Mia Leed. But he gets injured in a car accident and falls into a coma. For his sake, Mia works multiple jobs to pay for his medical bills. Mia's relatives often mock and tease her. They introduce Mia to the son of a wealthy family. However, as Mia resists, Sean wakes up. To return her favor, Sean reclaims his title with his parents and confronts those who have wronged Mia.

title: Christmas Homecoming of My Trillionaire Husband
synopsis_or_hook: Philip, the chairman of the Wharton Group and investor in the Ravenham Auto Plant, returns to his wife, Caroline's family to celebrate Christmas. However, unaware of his true identity, her family mocks and mistreats him and even tries to convince Caroline to divorce him, causing her to doubt Riley, until his true identity is revealed, shaming everyone who doubted him. Riley and Caroline reconcile and enjoy their Christmas together.
